metadata.title: Status App: secure peer-to-peer private messenger
metadata.description: Status App combines an end-to-end encrypted messenger and a secure browser into a private, decentralized ecosystem with no phone number or email required.
metadata.notFoundDescription: The page you were looking for could not be found. Return to the Status homepage.

prefooter.title: Be unstoppable
prefooter.description: Use the open-source, private messenger and asset manager.

notFound.title: Oh no! It looks like you're lost

download.mobileDescription: Get the full Status experience on the go. Available free for iOS and Android.
download.scanQrDescription: Point your camera at the code to install Status straight to your phone.
download.connectorTitle: Want to improve your Status experience?
download.connectorDescription: Connect to the apps you use with the Status Wallet Connector browser extension, and keep your keys protected inside Status.
download.connectorDocsQuestion: Want to learn how it works?

home.heroDescription: Message privately, manage your assets and browse the open web from one app that you alone control. No phone number, no tracking, no company in the middle.
home.keycardTitle:
Streamlined Workspace
The Ultimate App for Coordinated Group Projects
home.keycardDescription: Managing separate group chats, document links, and shared files across multiple window tabs often leaves your desktop cluttered and your focus fragmented. Status Desktop unifies your entire collaborative environment into a single, high-performance local application designed specifically to streamline how you stay connected. Instead of forcing you to constantly toggle between personal messaging clients, community servers, and internet browsers just to keep up with your daily coordination, everything is smoothly bundled into one clean workspace. You can coordinate with project teams, monitor active data feeds, and browse critical online references simultaneously without ever losing your place or interrupting your conversations.
home.walletTitle:
Send, receive
and manage
your assets
home.walletDescription: Full asset management, built right into the app. Send, receive and organise everything you hold, with clear balances and a history you can actually read. Your keys stay with you the entire time, so you are always the only one in control.
home.walletBuyTitle: Add funds in seconds with a card or Apple Pay
home.walletBuyDescription: Top up your account through trusted payment partners without leaving the app. No extra signups, no waiting around, no friction.
home.messengerDescription: Private messaging built for free speech. Every chat is end-to-end encrypted and your metadata stays hidden, so no one can read or trace your conversations. Messaging runs on Logos Messaging (formerly Waku), with no central server to seize or shut down.
home.messengerPseudonymDescription: Sign up with nothing at all. No phone number, no email, no card, no social account. Your profile is an anonymous identity created on your device the moment you start, and it belongs to you alone.
home.metadataTitle: Keep private who your friends are
home.metadataDescription: Other apps hide what you say while still logging who you talk to and when. Status hides all of it. Your contacts, your timing and your connections stay invisible to everyone, including the network itself.
home.communitiesDescription: Group chats built for real communities. Create members-only spaces, set your own rules and moderate locally, without a corporation deciding what is allowed. Ownership stays in the hands of the people who show up.
home.ownYourCryptoDescription: No one can freeze your account, lock you out or block a transfer. Your assets and your keys live on your device, so access never depends on a company staying online or staying friendly.
home.multiChainSupportDescription: See everything you hold in a single, always-current list. Balances update in real time across the networks you use, so you never juggle multiple apps just to know where you stand.
home.nftsDescription: Keep all of your digital items together in one gallery. View what you own, show it off and carry it with you across every device, all from inside the app.
home.openSourceDescription: Every layer is open to read, audit and fork: the Status backend, the StatusQ and NimQML interface, and the Logos Messaging (formerly Waku) protocol. Nothing about how Status works is hidden.
home.decentralisedDescription: No company server sits between you and your contacts. Messages travel across a peer-to-peer relay network, and communities run entirely on the members powering them from Status Desktop.
home.secureDescription: One set of keys protects your messages and your accounts, and only you hold them. Keys are generated on your device and stay in local memory or on a Keycard, never on a server.
home.communityDrivenDescription: Status is built in the open by its contributors and the people who use it. The community helps shape priorities, governance and where the product goes next.
home.permissionlessDescription: There is no central account registry, so no one can suspend, shadow-ban or lock you out. You join with an anonymous identity and reach anyone, anywhere.
home.freeAndAdFreeDescription: No ads. No paid tier. No imposed limits. Status runs no ad network and no tracking, so the app stays free and your data stays yours.

apps.metaDescription: Use Status on the go with the mobile app, or get the full set of features on desktop. Private messaging, asset management and a built-in browser, on every device you own.
apps.title: Get Status on every device
apps.description: Use Status on the go with the mobile app, or get the full suite on desktop. Everything stays in sync, so your messages and your assets follow you everywhere.
apps.createCommunityDescription: Use Status Desktop to launch your own community, set the rules and manage members and channels. You host it yourself, so no outside platform can take it down or change the terms on you.
apps.p2pDescription: By running Status Desktop you help keep the messaging network strong and independent, powered by people instead of company servers. It runs on Logos Messaging (formerly Waku).
apps.fullSuiteDescription: Status Desktop brings together everything from the mobile app and more: full asset management, community hosting and the complete messaging experience in one place.
apps.connectorTitle: Connect Status to the apps you use
apps.connectorDescription: Explore the web and sign in to apps safely with the browser extension, while your keys stay protected inside Status. You approve everything yourself, in a single click.
